item.title: Sea to Sea
item.description:
Section A1

Section A

Gibson Les Paul

Pickup Position: Bridge
Master Volume: 5
Master Tone: 3

Zoom G3Xn

Preset: 134 Jazz Fall

Joyo Tremolo OFF

Intensity: 50%
Rate: 50%

Fender Blues Jr. III

Volume: 8.0
Fat: OFF
Treble: 6.5
Bass: 6.0
Middle: 6.0
Master: 4.5
Reverb: 5.0

Blue Yeti

Gain: 9 o’clock
Mode: Stereo, on desk near plant
